meta.title: Rolando Ahuja Martínez — Full-stack engineer
meta.description: Full-stack engineer shipping production systems end-to-end — from Linux kernel namespaces to AI-powered admin panels. Based in Nuevo Laredo, México.

home.name: Rolando Ahuja Martínez
home.positioning: Full-stack engineer. I build production SaaS end-to-end — Linux networking, databases, authentication, AI integration, admin tooling, UI/UX.
home.aboutParagraph1: Mechatronics engineer by degree, shaped by manufacturing. As a process engineer at Modine Heat Transfer I worked on radiator lines for John Deere, Caterpillar, and Tesla Model X — writing flow charts, failure modes and control plans, designing rework fixtures in Solid Edge. That world taught me to model problems before touching them: PFMEA, Ishikawa, 8D, the discipline of understanding a system before changing it.
home.aboutParagraph2: Software came later, self-taught. The transition wasn't clean but the instincts carried over. Today the same discipline shows up in docs-as-code, in naming pipelines after mental models (factory, train, reconciler), in caring about color theory and type pairings as much as about authentication flows and RAG pipelines. Engineering is engineering — the medium changes, the method doesn't.
home.aboutParagraph3: Now I ship production SaaS for real clients. Full-stack, independent, bilingual. Every system I build is end-to-end: I own the Linux namespace, the database, the auth, the UI, the deploy pipeline. If you need someone who can do the whole loop, we should talk.

work.heading: Work
work.intro: All projects, grouped. The three starred ones are featured on the home page.

blindando.title: Blindando Sueños
blindando.summary: Insurance SaaS — admin panel with multi-tab tooling (posts, chatbot sessions, contact dedup, calendar, email auto-responder with RAG), web + Instagram chatbots, automated FB + IG publishing pipeline (factory → train → reconciler), OG image generation, custom CDN.

posteacasa.title: Postea Casa
posteacasa.summary: AI-powered real estate marketing generator. 7-step wizard with auto-save, produces PDF, HTML email, styled cover image and social copy from one brief. Mapbox autocomplete, magic-link auth, editorial design system.

s45-panel.title: S45 Panel
s45-panel.summary: Local web panel managing isolated VPN-tunneled browser sessions on Linux. Each client gets its own network namespace, WireGuard interface moved in from host, isolated Firefox. FastAPI + HTMX, status derived from live system state.

finanzas.title: Finanzas
finanzas.summary: Personal AI financial assistant. MCP-driven agent connecting to self-hosted Firefly III with persistent session memory, automatic habit detection, multi-currency tracking, and avalanche-method debt planning.

luna.title: Luna CDN
luna.summary: Self-hosted media CDN at luna.solutions45.com. Upload/delete endpoints with API key auth, blob storage, used as the image backbone for every other project.

barrera-lara.title: Dr. Barrera Lara
barrera-lara.summary: Bilingual clinical site for an aesthetic medicine practice. Next.js 16 with next-intl, localized routing, photo galleries per treatment, appointment booking.

gosen.title: Centro Cristiano Gosen
gosen.summary: Church site with service schedule, sermon library, and events. Vite + React.

camioncito.title: El Camioncito
camioncito.summary: Local taquería marketing site. Next.js with menu, location, contact.

tacos-manantial.title: Tacos Manantial
tacos-manantial.summary: Taquería landing page. Vite + React, mobile-first, menu-forward layout.

arreglos-florales.title: Arreglos Florales
arreglos-florales.summary: Florist catalog and order intake site. Next.js 15 with dictionaries and middleware.

gocha.title: gocha
gocha.summary: Experimental TypeScript tooling built on the Bun runtime with Biome as linter/formatter. Modern JS toolchain sandbox.

claude-monitor.title: claude-monitor
claude-monitor.summary: Lightweight monitor for local Claude sessions — tracks activity, parses transcripts, surfaces session telemetry to a widget bar.

notes.heading: Notes
notes.intro: Technical writing from the trenches. Long-form where it needs to be, terse where it doesn't.
notes.fallbackNotice: Only available in English for now.

footer.colophon: Cormorant Garamond + Plus Jakarta Sans · Triadic OKLCH, accent lifted per theme · Next.js 16 + Tailwind 4 + DaisyUI 5 · Deployed on Vercel
